subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。右手の人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin in Opening A. Release the right index-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 右手から糸を静かに外します
subtitle.en: Let the strings fall away from the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左小指向こう側の糸を右手で持ち、左人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: Take the far left–little-finger string with the right hand and place it onto the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左親指手前側の糸を右手で持ち、左人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: Take the near left-thumb string with the right hand and place it onto the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指上の輪の中から、左人差し指と小指を繋いでいる糸を右手で引き出します
subtitle.en: From inside the left index loop, draw out with the right hand the string that runs between the left index finger and left little finger.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指上の輪の中から、左人差し指と親指を繋いでいる糸を右手で引き出します。右手を離します
subtitle.en: From inside the left index loop, draw out with the right hand the string that runs between the left index finger and left thumb, and release the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の一番下の1本の輪を右手で持ち、上の2本の輪を残したまま人差し指から外します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the lowest left-index loop and release it from the finger while retaining the upper two loops.

subtitle.ja: 同様の操作を繰り返し、左人差し指に糸をかけ、上の輪の中から糸を引き出し、右手を離します
subtitle.en: Repeat the same procedure: place the string onto the left index finger, draw a string out from inside the upper loop, and release the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の下の2本の輪を右手で持ち、上の2本の輪を残したまま人差し指から外します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the two lower left-index loops and release them from the finger while retaining the upper two loops.

subtitle.ja: 同様の操作を、好きな回数だけ繰り返します
subtitle.en: Repeat this procedure as many times as desired.

subtitle.ja: 右手で引き出した2つの輪の、親指側に右手親指を、小指側に右手小指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the right thumb from below into the thumb-side loop of the two drawn-out loops, and the right little finger from below into the little-finger-side loop.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の2本の輪に、右人差し指を上から入れて2本の輪を移し取って完成です
subtitle.en: Insert the right index finger from above into the two left-index loops, transfer both loops, and show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の2本の輪を外して右手を引くことで、コウモリが次々と飛び立ちます
subtitle.en: Release the two right–index-finger loops and pull the right hand to let the bats fly off one after another.
